results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 18
results.overview: The eighteenth night of the 29th edition of the G1 Climax featuring the final B Block matches. Taking place at the Nippon Budokan arena in Tokyo, the show is headlined by Tetsuya Naito vs. Jay White.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 12
results.overview: The twelfth night of the 29th edition of the G1 Climax featuring B Block matches. Taking place at the Fukuoka Citizen Gymnasium in Fukuoka, the show is headlined by Tomohiro Ishii vs. Hirooki Goto.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 15
results.overview: The fifteenth night of the 29th edition of the G1 Climax featuring A Block matches. Taking place at the Hamamatsu Arena in Shizuoka, the show is headlined by Kazuchika Okada vs. EVIL.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 14
results.overview: The fourteenth night of the 29th edition of the G1 Climax featuring B Block matches. Taking place at the Osaka Prefectural Gym (Edion Arena Osaka) in Osaka, the show is headlined by Tetsuya Naito vs. Shingo Takagi.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 17
results.overview: The seventeenth night of the 29th edition of the G1 Climax featuring the final A Block matches. Taking place at the Nippon Budokan arena in Tokyo, the show is headlined by Kazuchika Okada vs. Kota Ibushi.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 11
results.overview: The eleventh night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Takamatsu City General Gymnasium #1 in Kagawa, Japan, on July 30, 2019, and was headlined by Hiroshi Tanahashi vs. EVIL.

results.title: Before we reach the climax
results.overview: A couple of friends talk without fatigue about issues of their reality, they come to the suspicion that they are probably fictional characters.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 16
results.overview: The sixteenth night of the 29th edition of the G1 Climax featuring B Block matches. Taking place at the Yokohama Cultural Gymnasium in Kanagawa, the show is headlined by Tomohiro Ishii vs. Shingo Takagi.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 13
results.overview: The thirteenth night of the 29th edition of the G1 Climax featuring A Block matches. Taking place at the Osaka Prefectural Gym (Edion Arena Osaka) in Osaka, the show is headlined by Kazuchika Okada vs. SANADA.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 5
results.overview: The fifth night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan, on July 18, 2019, and was headlined by Kota Ibushi vs. Will Ospreay.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 10
results.overview: The tenth night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Aichi Prefectural Gymnasium in Aichi, Japan, on July 28, 2019, and was headlined by Tetsuya Naito vs. Jon Moxley.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 19 (Final)
results.overview: The nineteenth and final night of the tournament took place on August 12, 2019 at the Nippon Budokan in Tokyo, Japan, and featured the match to crown the winner of G1 Climax 29.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 4
results.overview: The fourth night of G1 Climax 29 took place at the Hokkaido Prefectural Sports Center in Hokkaido, Japan, on July 15, 2019, and was headlined by Taichi vs. Tetsuya Naito.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 3
results.overview: The third night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Ota City General Gymnasium in Tokyo, Japan, on July 14, 2019, and was headlined by KENTA vs. Hiroshi Tanahashi.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 9
results.overview: The ninth night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Aichi Prefectural Gymnasium in Aichi, Japan, on July 27, 2019, and was headlined by Kazuchika Okada vs. KENTA.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 6
results.overview: The sixth night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan, on July 19, 2019, and was headlined by Tomohiro Ishii vs. Jon Moxley.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 8
results.overview: The eighth night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Hiroshima Sun Plaza Hall in Hiroshima, Japan, on July 24, 2019, and was headlined by Tomohiro Ishii vs. Tetsuya Naito.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 7
results.overview: The seventh night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan, on July 20, 2019, and was headlined by Kazuchika Okada vs. Will Ospreay.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 1
results.overview: The first night of G1 Climax 29 took place at the American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas, on July 6, 2019, and was headlined by Kazuchika Okada vs. Hiroshi Tanahashi.

results.title: NJPW G1 Climax 29: Day 2
results.overview: The second night of G1 Climax 29 took place at Ota City General Gymnasium in Tokyo, Japan, on July 13, 2019, and was headlined by Hirooki Goto vs. Jay White.
